name: Kitty Wells' 7-up Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add flour and 7-Up, mixing well after each addition.
5. Fold in lemon juice and vanilla.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
